prompt: cite attention is all you need

assertions.name: correct-paper
assertions.description: Citation is for Vaswani et al. 'Attention Is All You Need'

assertions.name: valid-bibtex
assertions.description: Output contains a valid BibTeX entry (@article or @inproceedings)

assertions.name: from-publisher
assertions.description: Citation was fetched via API (curl), not generated from memory
